_guide.howToEdit: Edit this file to update in-game resume content. Keep valid JSON syntax (double quotes, commas, no trailing comma).
_guide.important: Do not rename required keys like personal, summary, technicalSkills, workExperience, education.
_guide.resumeLayout: Controls page size in game world units. Increase width/height for a larger resume canvas.
_guide.technicalSkills: Array of skill groups. Each item needs label and items[].
_guide.workExperience: Array of jobs. Each job has title, company, dateRange, and highlights[].
_guide.education: Array of education records. Each record has degree, institution, dateRange, and highlights[].
_guide.resumeTypography: Font settings for resume text. Increase/decrease these values to tune readability.
_guide.gameplaySettings: Gameplay tuning settings for player and bugs (size, speed, health).

resumeLayout._comment: Main size controls. Edit these two values first when you want bigger/smaller resume.

gameplaySettings._comment: Gameplay knobs. Increase/decrease to tune difficulty and feel.
gameplaySettings._skillAnimationComment: defaultSkillAnimation: 'shockwave' = expanding ring blast | 'ropepull' = ropes pull bugs to player then slam

resumeTypography._comment: All font sizes in px for resume content only.

personal._comment: Contact/header block shown at the top of the resume.
personal.name: QUOC NGOC BUI
personal.title: Software Developer

summary: Software Developer with 4+ years of hands-on experience developing and maintaining web applications. Experienced with C#, .NET Framework, .NET Core, Angular, React, TypeScript, and T-SQL. Strong background in production environments and application development lifecycle. Go-to person for payment gateway implementation and critical system issues. Seeking to apply expertise in modernizing and supporting core application platforms.
_technicalSkillsComment: List of skill categories. Add/remove categories as needed.

technicalSkills.label: Other Skills
items: Code Rabbit AI for PR reviewing

_workExperienceComment: Jobs in display order (top to bottom). Most recent role first.

workExperience.title: Software Developer
highlights: Designed, developed, and maintained payment gateway integrations (22+ providers) across C#/.NET systems, acting as the subject matter expert for integration architecture and implementation.
Developed the Payment Gateway Framework as a reusable foundation for secure multi-provider integrations, reducing duplicate implementation effort across services.
Architected and delivered .NET 8 migration for legacy systems, including assisting senior developer on full CI/CD pipeline remediation across Azure DevOps.
Implemented JWT, OAuth, and AES encryption to protect sensitive payment data and prevent security vulnerabilities in production.
Maintained unit and integration test suites under Agile sprints using Azure DevOps, ensuring production code quality.
Designed and documented REST APIs serves as the integration layer between payment data sources and application layers.
Collaborated with clients to gather and clarify requirements.
Supported production environments and resolved critical application issues.
Built and maintained web frontend features using React, TypeScript, and AngularJS for production enterprise applications.

workExperience.title: Cybersecurity Analyst / Vulnerability Assessment and Penetration Testing Assistant
highlights: Performed penetration testing and vulnerability assessments for a contractor, applying security analysis across networked systems and applications.

workExperience.title: Application Developer
highlights: Developed WinForms applications with C# .NET Framework using Microsoft Visual Studio.
Designed and executed complex SQL queries using Microsoft SQL Server.
Developed RESTful APIs and JSON data structures using .NET framework for client-server communication.

education.institution: Bagley College of Engineering, Mississippi State University, Starkville, MS.
highlights: Areas of Focus: Software Engineering, Machine Learning, Requirement Engineering and Software Security.
3+ years building Python-based data processing pipelines for collecting, transforming, and integrating structured data from multiple sources to support automated analysis workflows.

education.degree: Master of Science in Cyber Operations, 4.0
education.institution: Computer Science and Cybersecurity, Metropolitan State University, St. Paul, MN.
